title: As Omicron Threat Looms, Inflation Limits Fed’s Room to Maneuver
content: The central bank has spent years guarding against economic blows. Now it is in inflation-fighting mode, even as a potential risk emerges.
en_title: As Omicron Threat Looms, Inflation Limits Fed’s Room to Maneuver
en_content: The central bank has spent years guarding against economic blows. Now it is in inflation-fighting mode, even as a potential risk emerges.

title: A New Tesla Safety Concern: Drivers Can Play Video Games in Moving Cars
content: The feature raises fresh questions about whether Tesla is compromising safety as it rushes to add new technologies.
en_title: A New Tesla Safety Concern: Drivers Can Play Video Games in Moving Cars
en_content: The feature raises fresh questions about whether Tesla is compromising safety as it rushes to add new technologies.

title: Kellogg Workers Prolong Strike by Rejecting Contract Proposal
content: About 1,400 have been on strike at four cereal plants since Oct. 5 over a dispute that has revolved around a two-tier compensation structure.

org_facet: Bakery, Confectionery, Tobacco Workers and Grain Millers International Union

en_title: Kellogg Workers Prolong Strike by Rejecting Contract Proposal
en_content: About 1,400 have been on strike at four cereal plants since Oct. 5 over a dispute that has revolved around a two-tier compensation structure.

title: Sinking natural gas prices are a sign of hope for household winter heating bills.
content: The drop came after government weather forecasts projected a warmer-than-expected winter for most of the country.
en_title: Sinking natural gas prices are a sign of hope for household winter heating bills.
en_content: The drop came after government weather forecasts projected a warmer-than-expected winter for most of the country.

title: Americans’ Pandemic-Era ‘Excess Savings’ Are Dwindling for Many
content: The drop in cash reserves has vast implications for the working class and could dampen consumer spending, a large share of economic activity.
en_title: Americans’ Pandemic-Era ‘Excess Savings’ Are Dwindling for Many
en_content: The drop in cash reserves has vast implications for the working class and could dampen consumer spending, a large share of economic activity.

title: As China Evergrande Teeters, Beijing Steps In
content: The creation of a committee with government representation reassured investors fearful about what would happen if the huge property developer collapsed.

more_info.byline: By Alexandra Stevenson and Cao Li

en_title: As China Evergrande Teeters, Beijing Steps In
en_content: The creation of a committee with government representation reassured investors fearful about what would happen if the huge property developer collapsed.

title: The Stock Market’s Covid Pattern: Faster Recovery From Each Panic
content: Pandemic-driven declines don’t last as long as before, and are followed by recoveries to new highs. The dip after Omicron is following a similar pattern.

more_info.byline: By Karl Russell and Mohammed Hadi

en_title: The Stock Market’s Covid Pattern: Faster Recovery From Each Panic
en_content: Pandemic-driven declines don’t last as long as before, and are followed by recoveries to new highs. The dip after Omicron is following a similar pattern.

title: Seeking Space for Solar Farms, Cities Find Room at Their Airports
content: Airports around the nation are installing solar arrays on unused land, roofs and parking garages, helping them achieve self-sufficiency while also providing power to their communities.
en_title: Seeking Space for Solar Farms, Cities Find Room at Their Airports
en_content: Airports around the nation are installing solar arrays on unused land, roofs and parking garages, helping them achieve self-sufficiency while also providing power to their communities.

title: Pfizer’s vaccine provides some protection against Omicron, a lab study suggests.
content: A South African study found that Omicron may dull the power of coronavirus vaccines, but hinted that booster shots might help.

more_info.byline: By Carl Zimmer and Benjamin Mueller

en_title: Pfizer’s vaccine provides some protection against Omicron, a lab study suggests.
en_content: A South African study found that Omicron may dull the power of coronavirus vaccines, but hinted that booster shots might help.

title: Amazon’s cloud computing outage disrupts its warehouse operations.
content: Amazon Web Services began reporting increased “error rates” in its cloud operations on Tuesday morning.
en_title: Amazon’s cloud computing outage disrupts its warehouse operations.

title: President Biden’s pick for a key banking regulator backs out.
content: Saule Omarova withdrew herself from consideration to be comptroller of the currency after attacks from Republicans and banking lobbyists that labeled her a communist.

title: Disney hires Geoff Morrell, a BP executive, as its corporate affairs chief.
content: Mr. Morrell’s hiring ends a guessing game about who Bob Chapek, Disney’s chief, would select to succeed Zenia B. Mucha, who announced her retirement as Disney’s chief communications officer in July.
en_title: Disney hires Geoff Morrell, a BP executive, as its corporate affairs chief.
en_content: Mr. Morrell’s hiring ends a guessing game about who Bob Chapek, Disney’s chief, would select to succeed Zenia B. Mucha, who announced her retirement as Disney’s chief communications officer in July.

title: Stellantis will spend $34 billion on software and new vehicles.
content: The automaker plans to develop new vehicles based on software that will let it sell entertainment, navigation and other subscription services to buyers of its cars and trucks.
en_title: Stellantis will spend $34 billion on software and new vehicles.

title: Sri Lanka’s Plunge Into Organic Farming Brings Disaster
content: The economically troubled country banned chemical fertilizers without preparing farmers, prompting a surge in food prices and worries about shortages.

title: Millions of Followers? For Book Sales, ‘It’s Unreliable.’
content: Social-media fandom can help authors score book deals and bigger advances, but does it translate to how a new title will sell? Publishers are increasingly skeptical.

title: Your Face Is, or Will Be, Your Boarding Pass

title: Michael Steinhardt, Billionaire, Surrenders $70 Million in Stolen Relics
content: The hedge fund pioneer is barred for life from buying more antiquities. He turned over 180 stolen objects that had decorated his homes and office.

title: Microsoft Seizes 42 Websites From a Chinese Hacking Group
content: The group was likely using the websites to install malware that helped it gather data from government agencies and other groups, the company said.
en_title: Microsoft Seizes 42 Websites From a Chinese Hacking Group
en_content: The group was likely using the websites to install malware that helped it gather data from government agencies and other groups, the company said.

title: Toyota will spend $1.3 billion on a N.C. electric car battery plant.

title: Exxon Mobil aims for net-zero emissions from its operations in the Permian Basin by 2030.
content: Exxon plans to reduce greenhouse gas emissions across its business, but its goal does not include offsetting emissions from its customers, such as car and truck owners and airlines.
en_title: Exxon Mobil aims for net-zero emissions from its operations in the Permian Basin by 2030.
en_content: Exxon plans to reduce greenhouse gas emissions across its business, but its goal does not include offsetting emissions from its customers, such as car and truck owners and airlines.
